narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads H4 CSM at 95 with GBP accelerating to 100, both confirming the H4 risk-on medium regime as copper's 1.58% surge provides the sole macro-risk tailwind against a D1 risk-off backdrop still in transition. EURUSD D1+H4 strong sell is the cleanest expression; USDCHF D1 buy plus H4 strong buy with EURUSD correlation at -0.84 doubles the USD long conviction, while GBPJPY at +0.89 correlation to GBPUSD makes GBPJPY the GBP acceleration vehicle. AUD H4 CSM diverges from D1 by 37 points, the largest gap in the dataset, flagging AUD cross positioning as unstable and unreliable for trend entries.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: GBPJPY CMP 57 with H4 at 80 surging, NZDJPY CMP 54 with H4 at 58 rising
Fading: AUDUSD CMP 48 with D1 and H4 both below 50 and declining

WATCH
JPY intervention risk activates above 160 on USDJPY, a hard ceiling that kills CADJPY longs given +0.67 correlation
CAD CPI revision or BoC commentary hits USDCAD, D1 momentum at 76 confirms continuation higher on any dovish surprise
Eurozone inflation follow-through prints on EURUSD, D1+H4 strong sell alignment accelerates toward next support with USDCHF mirroring inversely

themes.theme: US Dollar strength from hawkish Fed expectations and bond yield support
EUR weakness from softer Eurozone inflation data
GBP outperformance despite softer UK inflation
JPY intervention risks near 160 level limiting upside
CAD weakness from softer CPI reducing BoC hike expectations
EM currencies under pressure from crude oil elevated prices
Safe-haven demand supporting USD and limiting commodity-linked currency gains
Oil volatility above 102 from US-Iran ceasefire uncertainty

key_observation: Fed hawkish signals combined with bond yield strength are driving USD Index towards 100.00. EUR selling accelerated by softer inflation data. GBP outperforming Euro despite domestic softness. JPY capped by intervention risks near 160. Safe-haven flows supporting USD while EM currencies pressured by oil prices and growth concerns.
watch: Fed Minutes release for fresh hawkish momentum confirmation. JPY intervention at 160 level. EUR/USD downside continuation. Oil geopolitical dynamics. Nvidia earnings impact on risk sentiment.
